abstract.para: Use the pre-migration check tool to make sure the &ha; cluster can safely migrate from &slehaa; 15 to &slehaa; 16. The tool reports any issues that prevent the upgrade, as well as issues that can be fixed after the upgrade.

topic.para: You can perform this procedure on any node in the cluster.

step.para: Log in to the node either as the &rootuser; user or as a user with sudo privileges.
This command reports issues in two categories:

listitem.para: The WARN category indicates cluster configuration that isn't recommended, such as deprecated features. Issues in this category can be fixed after the upgrade, so the migration check passes. For example:
listitem.screen: [WARN] Corosync transport "udpu" will be deprecated in favor of "knet" in corosync 3.

listitem.para: The FAIL category indicates cluster configuration that can't be fixed after the upgrade, such as removed resource agents. Issues in this category must be fixed before you can upgrade the cluster, so the migration check fails. The command's output will tell you what to fix. For example:
listitem.screen: [FAIL] The following resource agents will be removed in SLES 16. * ocf:heartbeat:IPaddr: please replace it with ocf:heartbeat:IPaddr2
